## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement you would like to see.

## Problem or use case

What workflow or limitation is this trying to solve?

## Proposed approach

If you already have an idea for the design or behavior, describe it here.

## Alternatives considered

List any workarounds or alternative approaches you considered.

## Additional context

Add screenshots, examples, or references if helpful.
